title: Media Appearances
text:
“Predicting the Puck With Pythagoras”
At the 2025 Ontario Universities Sports Analytics Conference I spoke on my work with predicting NHL season long wins using the pythagorean win expectations formula.
Watch the Full Talk →








At the 2025 MSU Simon Lecture presented by the Actuarial Sciences department I delivered a short technical lecture on the applications of the implied random variable to sports.
Read the Lecture Recap →

title: Media Appearances
text:
Featured Interviews





FOX 47: Predicting the Rivalry
“MSU Students use math and statistics to predict the winner of Friday’s matchup with the Wolverines”
I sat down with Fox 47 to discuss using the Pythagorean Expectation (the “Moneyball formula”) to analyze the MSU vs. Michigan basketball matchup.
Watch the Full Interview →







The Drive with Jack
“Albert Cohen & Joey Larabee discuss analytics in sports”
In this appearance on The Drive with Jack, I joined the show with my mentor Albert Cohen to discuss the growing and changing role of analytics in sports.
Listen to the Show →

title: Joey Larabee
text: I am a graduate student at Michigan State University pursuing an M.S. in Data Science and a Graduate Certificate in Sports Analytics. My academic work focuses on statistical modeling, machine learning, and data engineering techniques applied to high velocity sports data. I currently work with SMT (SportsMEDIA Technology) on the RAZOR NHL platform, where I analyze NHL Player and Puck Tracking data to support performance insights, spatial analysis, and real time decision support tools. My experience spans data preprocessing, feature engineering, predictive modeling, and visualization within the hockey analytics ecosystem. Before transitioning into analytics, I spent time as a goalie, coach, and sports betting trader—experiences that shaped my understanding of the game and inform my approach to quantitative evaluation. I am also a graduate of Colorado College (Class of 2020). Thank you for visiting my website. You can explore my project portfolio using the tabs above, and connect with me via LinkedIn or email using the links on the left.
